description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/paddy-hack/nikola Docker image. Add a pages job (default test stage) that runs `nikola build`, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and is triggered only when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH to deploy to GitLab Pages. Add a test job (default test stage) that also runs `nikola build` but is triggered only when $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME != $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH. No services, caches, or additional variables are defined.
